cases.label: PostgreSQL grounded join draft
cases.sql:
SELECT o.id, u.email
FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.status = :status
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
diagnostics: Named parameter :status still requires parameter review before execution

cases.label: PostgreSQL partial SQL completion
cases.sql:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM orders
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY order_count DESC;

cases.label: MySQL customer order listing
cases.sql:
SELECT o.id, c.email, o.status
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE o.order_date >= :from_date
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC;
diagnostics: Named parameter :from_date still requires parameter review before execution

cases.label: MySQL write draft stays bounded
diagnostics: Uses named parameters so execution still goes through parameter review and readonly/runtime guards
